Thought 4: The witness accounts place Chris in the park, not near the office building, at the time of the investigation. The "disappearance" noted by witnesses seems to refer to him leaving their line of sight in the park, not necessarily implicating him in the crime. His sunglasses being in lost and found suggest he was at the office building at some point, but it doesn't tie him to the murder. The narrative provides no evidence placing Chris near Murray's office at the time of the poisoning. Conversely, Gloria was known to be in the office building late at night, precisely when Murray was often there alone. Her motive is strong and directly stated, while Chris's is absent. The bottle of bleach was explicitly noted as belonging to Gloria and was found on the stage edge among her props. This is a direct link.
